title: Logistics Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

Job Title: Supervisor - Logistics

Location: Singapore

Position Type: Full-time

Reports to: Warehouse Manager.

Job Summary:

The Inbound Supervisor plays a critical role in optimizing the inbound supply chain process, ensuring the timely and efficient receipt of goods. This position is responsible for overseeing the inbound logistics operations, managing a team of warehouse assistants, and collaborating with internal teams and various stakeholders to enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and maintain high-quality standards.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Supervise Operations: Manage and lead a team of warehouse assistants ensuring a smooth and efficient inbound supply chain process.

2. Inventory Control: Implement effective inventory management practices to ensure the stocks are optimize stock levels, minimize carrying costs, and prevent overstock or stockouts.

3. Performance Metrics: Track key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure and improve inbound logistics performance, such as on-time deliveries, order accuracy, and cost per unit received.

4. Process Improvement: Continuously assess and enhance inbound logistics processes to drive efficiency and productivity improvements.

5. Risk Management: Identify potential risks in the inbound supply chain and develop strategies to mitigate them effectively.

6. Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborate with other departments, such as customer Relation team, and Outbound, to ensure alignment in supply chain goals and objectives.

7. Team Development: Provide training and mentorship, to team members to foster their professional growth and enhance their performance.

Qualifications:

Diploma in logistics, supply chain management, business, or a related field.

Proven experience in inbound logistics management, preferably in the logistics or manufacturing industry.

Strong knowledge of transportation, warehousing, and inventory management best practices.

Proficiency in using logistics management software and tools.

Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.

Problem-solving and analytical abilities.

Knowledge of regulatory requirements and compliance in logistics.

Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

• Preferably forklift license.

Physical Requirements:

• The role may require occasional lifting and physical activities related to warehouse operations.

Conclusion:

The Supervisor in logistics plays a pivotal role in ensuring the efficient flow of materials and products into the organization, contributing to cost savings and overall supply chain optimization. This position requires leadership skills, a keen understanding of logistics operations, and the ability to drive process improvements and cost reductions. The Inbound supervisor collaborates with various stakeholders to ensure a seamless inbound logistics process while maintaining high standards of quality and compliance.

postedCompany.description:
FIEGE LOGISTICS PTE. LTD. | FIEGE Singapore

The FIEGE Group, headquartered in Greven in Westphalia, is a leading European logistics company that specializes in efficient supply chain solutions. With a workforce of over 15,000 at more than 150 sites, FIEGE operates on an international scale from core markets in Europe, to India and China.

Since its formation by Joan Joseph Fiege in 1873, FIEGE has been family-run – and still is to date, by now in the fifth generation. The cousins Jens and Felix Fiege are part of the four-member Executive Board and manage the company in dual leadership.

FIEGE is seen as a pioneer of contract logistics and since its formation has evolved from a transport company to a globally operating full-service logistics provider. The tradition-conscious organization never ceases to reinvent itself in order to remain state of the art in times of digitization and automation.

FIEGE focuses on these core sectors: Fashion, Healthcare, Industry, Consumer Goods, Tires, Media & Mail and Multi-channel Retail. We develop integrated customer solutions for eCommerce, transport, sea and air cargo, customs clearance, warehousing, parcel deliveries and real estate management, with services that span the full range from consultation to implementation of a supply chain concept.
postedCompany.name: FIEGE LOGISTICS PTE. LTD.
